name: Radio Group
description: Foldkit-native Base UI Radio Group primitive preserving controlled group value semantics, item checked state, disabled/read-only/required/invalid states, arrow-key roving selection payloads, Space keyup activation, and native radio form inputs without internal state.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native render helper.
Provides Effect Schema, Option, and predicate helpers for serializable options and activation payloads.

development.reason: Origin React runtime is evidence only; installable source is Foldkit-native.
Origin Base UI React group primitive is replaced by this Foldkit implementation.
Radio item and indicator public semantics are included in this grouped Foldkit primitive for this implementation slice.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Arrow-key roving selection emits a focus selector payload instead of mutating focus internally.
deviations.rationale: Foldkit installable source is stateless and pure. The consuming update owns model changes and can run focus commands from the emitted selector without hidden component state.

deviations.summary: Radio root, indicator, and input semantics are exposed through the Radio Group item descriptors instead of a separate base-ui/radio registry item.
deviations.rationale: This implementation slice is scoped to base-ui/radio-group and shadcn/radio-group. Colocating item attributes preserves the public grouped radio behavior without introducing an out-of-scope registry item.
